text:
There is updated version of lang/rakudo (  attached shar  file of port).

http://downloads.sourceforge.net/rakudoport/rakudo-200910.tgz

Changes:
        + update rakudo :#22("Thousand Oaks")
        + build from installed parrot (ver 1.7.0)

This PR depends on on parrot 1.7.0
(http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=139964)


Best regards
